rulings.Case Title: BISHOP DONALD PIPKINS, AN INDIVIDUAL et al VS. HOMEQ CORPORATION et al

rulings.Case Title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW VS. MESHA MONGE-IRIZARRY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 08, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT MESHA MONGE-IRIZARRY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer.
